title: More Nonsense Limerick 98
content:
There was an old person of Brigg,
    Who purchased no end of a wig;
    So that only his nose, 
    And the end of his toes,
    Could be seen when he walked about Brigg.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "More Nonsense Limerick 98", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
